message:
refactor(package_manager): extract npm_prefix_root to eliminate scope-matching duplication

The npm install, uninstall, and install_path methods each independently
matched PackageScope to determine the npm root directory, with three
separate match arms duplicating the Temporary→temporary_dir("npm"),
Project→project_npm_root(), User→global/special-case logic.

Extract npm_prefix_root(scope) → Option<PathBuf> that returns Some(root)
for Project/Temporary scopes and None for User scope (which needs
special global handling). All three call sites now delegate to this
single source of truth:

- npm_install_path: match on npm_prefix_root().map(|r| r.join("node_modules").join(name))
  with fallback to global_npm_root for None
- install_npm: if-let on npm_prefix_root for prefix-based install,
  else npm install -g
- uninstall_npm: let-else on npm_prefix_root for prefix-based uninstall,
  else npm uninstall -g

Adds npm_prefix_root_matches_scope unit test verifying the mapping
for all three PackageScope variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
